description: 苏州地铁智能助手样式中心，统一管理 Qt Widgets 的 QSS 字符串。

styles.model_settings.root: background-color: rgba(255,255,255,242); border: 1px solid rgba(39,66,112,120); border-radius: 10px;
styles.model_settings.title: color: rgba(34,60,106,230); font: 700 12px 'Microsoft YaHei'; border: none;
styles.model_settings.station_hint: color: rgba(34,60,106,185); font: 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; border: none;
styles.model_settings.checkbox: QCheckBox { color: rgba(34,60,106,220); font: 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; border: none; }
styles.text_prompt.root: background-color: rgba(255,255,255,240); border: 1px solid rgba(36,66,112,140); border-radius: 10px;
styles.text_prompt.input: QLineEdit { background: rgba(246,248,252,250); border: 1px solid rgba(35,69,118,120); border-radius: 7px; padding: 6px 10px; font: 12px 'Microsoft YaHei'; }
styles.text_prompt.send_button: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(32,92,182,220); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 7px; font: 700 12px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 6px 0; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(32,92,182,245); } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: rgba(24,74,149,245); }
styles.station_panel.title: color: rgba(16,44,88,228); font: 700 13px 'Microsoft YaHei'; background: transparent;
styles.station_panel.common_label: color: rgba(20,48,86,220); font: 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; background: transparent;
styles.station_panel.fare_label: color: rgba(24,72,142,236); font: 700 12px 'Microsoft YaHei'; background: transparent;
styles.station_panel.eta_label: color: rgba(20,72,126,230); font: 700 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; background: transparent;
styles.station_panel.goto_button: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(30,102,208,232); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 700 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 6px 10px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(30,102,208,248); } QPushButton:disabled { background-color: rgba(138,152,176,164); }
styles.settlement.panel: #settlementPanel { background-color: rgba(94, 101, 112, 232); border-bottom-left-radius: 16px; border-bottom-right-radius: 16px; } #titleLabel { color: rgba(242, 246, 252, 246); font: 700 21px 'Microsoft YaHei'; } #subtitleLabel { color: rgba(219, 226, 238, 232); font: 12px 'Microsoft YaHei'; } #summaryLabel { color: rgba(235, 241, 251, 244); font: 700 14px 'Microsoft YaHei'; } #infoLabel { color: rgba(213, 222, 236, 236); font: 12px 'Microsoft YaHei'; } #readonlyValue { color: rgba(233, 239, 249, 246); background-color: rgba(118, 126, 140, 186); font: 700 12px 'Microsoft YaHei'; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; } #ticketInfoSuccess { color: rgba(20, 79, 45, 238); background-color: rgba(233, 247, 238, 228); font: 12px 'Microsoft YaHei'; border-radius: 10px; padding: 12px; }
styles.settlement.quantity_button: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(236, 241, 249, 244); color: rgba(30, 61, 101, 240); border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 700 18px 'Microsoft YaHei'; } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: rgba(222, 232, 245, 250); }
styles.settlement.quantity_spin: QSpinBox { background-color: rgba(246, 248, 252, 230); color: rgba(25, 52, 88, 245); border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 700 13px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 4px 8px; }
styles.settlement.pay_method_button: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(235,242,252,238); color: #2e4f80; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font: 700 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 7px 10px; } QPushButton:checked { background-color: rgba(218,232,252,248); }
styles.settlement.pay_button: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(34, 101, 202, 240); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font: 700 14px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 8px 16px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(30, 92, 186, 248); } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: rgba(24, 77, 160, 250); }
styles.settlement.close_button: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(143, 152, 167, 225); color: rgba(244, 247, 252, 245); border: none; border-radius: 10px; font: 700 13px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 8px 14px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(132, 143, 160, 236); } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: rgba(116, 128, 146, 246); }
styles.metro_map.line_button_all: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(66, 78, 96, 80); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 230); border: none; border-radius: 0px; padding: 0px; font: 10px 'Microsoft YaHei'; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(66, 78, 96, 130); } QPushButton:checked { background-color: rgba(45, 56, 72, 245); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,220); font: 700 10px 'Microsoft YaHei'; }
styles.metro_map.line_button_template: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(%1, %2, %3, 95); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 235); border: none; border-radius: 0px; padding: 0px; font: 10px 'Microsoft YaHei'; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(%1, %2, %3, 150); } QPushButton:checked { background-color: rgba(%1, %2, %3, 255); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,230); font: 700 10px 'Microsoft YaHei'; }
styles.metro_map.quick_buy_title: color: rgba(22,58,108,228); font: 700 13px 'Microsoft YaHei'; background: transparent;
styles.metro_map.quick_buy_button: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(245,248,253,245); color: rgba(38,68,111,230); border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 4px 8px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(236,243,252,250); } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: rgba(228,236,248,252); }
styles.metro_map.quick_buy_step_button: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(236,243,252,245); color: rgba(38,68,111,232); border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: 700 14px 'Microsoft YaHei'; } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: rgba(228,236,248,252); }
styles.metro_map.quick_buy_spin: QSpinBox { background-color: rgba(245,248,253,245); color: rgba(38,68,111,230); border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: 700 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 4px 6px; }
styles.metro_map.quick_buy_custom_buy: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(245,248,253,245); color: rgba(38,68,111,230); border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: 11px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 4px 8px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(236,243,252,250); } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: rgba(228,236,248,252); }
styles.metro_map.quick_buy_day_pass: QPushButton { background-color: rgba(250,247,240,246); color: rgba(112,84,32,232); border: none; border-radius: 6px; font: 10px 'Microsoft YaHei'; padding: 5px 8px; } QPushButton:hover { background-color: rgba(248,242,227,252); } QPushButton:pressed { background-color: rgba(241,233,214,252); }
